name: pocket-reader
title: Pocket Reader
description: Text to speech powered by Kyutai Pocket TTS
author: andypai

commands.name: read-selected-text
commands.title: Read Selected Text
commands.description: Immediately reads the selected text or clipboard content without confirmation.

commands.name: read-text-editor
commands.title: Read Text with Editor
commands.description: Opens an editor to review and modify text before reading aloud.

commands.name: onboarding
commands.title: Get Started
commands.description: Onboarding and configuration for Pocket TTS.

preferences.name: mode
preferences.title: Mode
preferences.description: Choose between using a running Pocket TTS server or invoking the CLI.

preferences.name: serverUrl
preferences.title: Server URL
preferences.description: Pocket TTS serve endpoint URL (typically http://localhost:8000).

preferences.name: voice
preferences.title: Voice
preferences.description: Voice name or URL/path (e.g., alba, hf://.../casual.wav, https://..., /path/to/voice.wav).

preferences.name: speed
preferences.title: Speed
preferences.description: Playback speed (0.25-4.0). Requires ffmpeg when not 1.0.

preferences.name: outputFormat
preferences.title: Output Format
preferences.description: Audio format for output files. Requires ffmpeg when not WAV.

preferences.name: lsdDecodeSteps
preferences.title: LSD Decode Steps (generate mode)
preferences.description: Number of decode steps for generate mode.

preferences.name: noiseClamp
preferences.title: Noise Clamp (generate mode)
preferences.description: Noise clamp for generate mode (leave empty to use default).

preferences.name: framesAfterEos
preferences.title: Frames After EOS (generate mode)
preferences.description: Number of frames to generate after EOS (leave empty for auto).

preferences.name: device
preferences.title: Device (generate mode)
preferences.description: Device for generate mode (e.g., cpu, cuda).

preferences.name: saveAudioFiles
preferences.title: Save Audio Files
preferences.description: Save generated audio files to ~/.cache/raycast-pocket-tts/ for debugging and reuse.
preferences.label: Save Audio Files

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
